     - The host began a new Guest Star session.
*   [channel.guest\_star\_session.end](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelguest_star_sessionend)
     - A running Guest Star session has ended.
*   [channel.guest\_star\_guest.update](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelguest_star_guestupdate)
     - A guest has moved between interaction states in an active Guest Star session.
*   [channel.guest\_star\_slot.update](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelguest_star_slotupdate)
     - A slot setting has been updated in an active Guest Star session.
*   [channel.guest\_star\_settings.update](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelguest_star_settingsupdate)
     - The host preferences for Guest Star have been updated.

The following [authentication scopes](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication/scopes)
 have been added:

*   `channel:read:guest_star`
*   `channel:manage:guest_star`
*   `moderator:read:guest_star`
*   `moderator:manage:guest_star`

2023‑04‑12

The EventSub WebSockets connection URL has been updated to `wss://eventsub.wss.twitch.tv/ws`. See [the announcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/update-required-for-eventsub-websockets-beta-connection-url/45079)
 for more details.

2023‑04‑05

Twitch’s [CLI](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/cli)
 has been updated to allow for testing [Reconnect message flow](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/cli/websocket-event-command/#testing-reconnect-messages)
 and [forwarding EventSub events](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/cli/websocket-event-command/#forwarding-mock-events-to-clients)
 to the mock WebSocket server.

2023‑03‑30

[Get Channel Chat Badges](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-chat-badges)
 and [Get Global Chat Badges](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-global-chat-badges)
 have been updated to include the following return fields; `title`, `description`, `click_action`, and `click_url`. See [the announcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/legacy-badges-endpoint-shutdown-details-and-timeline-june-2023/44621)
 for more information.

2023‑03‑15

References to the Twitch Developer Rig have been updated or removed following the [end of support announcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/end-of-support-for-the-twitch-developer-rig/42995)
.

2023‑02‑28

This release includes the following updates:

1.  [Search Channels](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#search-channels)
    , [Get Streams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-streams)
    , [Get Followed Streams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-followed-streams)
     — Include the following changes:
    *   Added customizable tags via a new `tags` field.
    *   Deprecated the `tag_ids` field in the response. The response continues to include the field; however, it will only return an empty array.
2.  [Get All Stream Tags](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-all-stream-tags)
     and [Get Stream Tags](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-stream-tags)
     — Include the following change:
    *   Deprecated the `tag_ids` field in the response. The response continues to include the field; however, it will only return an empty array. These endpoints will return a 410 response on July 13, 2023
3.  Additionally, removed the Replace Stream Tags endpoint.

For information about these changes, see [Adding customizable tags to the Twitch API](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/adding-customizable-tags-to-the-twitch-api/42921)
.

2023‑02‑27

“Get Code Status” and “Redeem Code” Twitch API endpoints have been decommissioned and removed from documentation.

2023‑02‑22

This release includes the following updates:

1.  Moved the following Channel Follows endpoints and subscription type from open beta to generally available:
    *   [Get Followed Channels](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-followed-channels)
         — Gets a list of broadcasters that the specified user follows.
    *   [Get Channel Followers](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-followers)
         — Gets a list of users that follow the specified broadcaster.
    *   [channel.follows](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelfollow)
         — Version 2 of the existing subscription type that will now require the `moderator:read:followers` scope.
2.  Added deprecation notices to the following:
    *   [Get User Follows](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-users-follows)
        
    *   [channel.follows](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelfollow)
         (v1)
3.  Updated the [Product Lifecycle](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/product-lifecycle/)
     with the above deprecation notice.

2023‑02‑09

Moved the following Shoutout endpoint and subscription types from open beta to generally available:

*   [Send a Shoutout](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#send-a-shoutout)
     — This endpoint sends a Shoutout to the specified broadcaster.
*   [channel.shoutout.create](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelshoutoutcreate)
     — This subscription type sends a notification when the specified broadcaster sends a Shoutout.
*   [channel.shoutout.receive](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelshoutoutreceive)
     — This subscription type sends a notification when the specified broadcaster receives a Shoutout.

2023‑02‑03

Added the following Twitch API endpoints and subscription types to open beta.

*   [Get Followed Channels](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-followed-channels)
     — Gets a list of broadcasters that the specified user follows.
*   [Get Channel Followers](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-followers)
     — Gets a list of users that follow the specified broadcaster.
*   [channel.follows](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelfollow)
     (beta) — Beta version of the existing subscription type that will now require the `moderator:read:followers` scope.

`low-trust-users` has been added to [PubSub reference](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/pubsub)
.

2023‑01‑19

This release includes the following updates:

1.  Added the following Shoutout endpoint and subscription types to open beta:
    *   [Send a Shoutout](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#send-a-shoutout)
         — This endpoint sends a Shoutout to the specified broadcaster.
    *   [channel.shoutout.create](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelshoutoutcreate)
         — This subscription type sends a notification when the specified broadcaster sends a Shoutout.
    *   [channel.shoutout.receive](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelshoutoutreceive)
         — This subscription type sends a notification when the specified broadcaster receives a Shoutout.
2.  Moved the following Charity endpoints and subscription types from open beta to generally available:
    *   [Get Charity Campaign Donations](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-charity-campaign-donations)
         — Returns the list of donations that users have made to the broadcaster’s active charity campaign.
    *   [Get Charity Campaign](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-charity-campaign)
         — Gets information about the charity campaign that the broadcaster is running, such as their fundraising goal and the amount that’s been donated so far.
    *   [channel.charity\_campaign.start](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaignstart)
         — Sends a notification when the broadcaster starts a charity campaign.
    *   [channel.charity\_campaign.progress](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaignprogress)
         — Sends a notification when the broadcaster changes the fundraiser’s target goal or when progress is made towards the goal.
    *   [channel.charity\_campaign.stop](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaignstop)
         — Sends a notification when the broadcaster stops a charity campaign.
    *   [channel.charity\_campaign.donate](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaigndonate)
         — Sends an event notification when a user donates to the broadcaster’s charity campaign.

2023‑01‑10

This release includes the following updates:

1.  Moved the following Shield Mode endpoints and subscription types from open beta to generally available:
    *   [Get Shield Mode Status](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-shield-mode-status)
         — This endpoint gets the broadcaster’s Shield Mode activation status.
    *   [Update Shield Mode Status](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#update-shield-mode-status)
         — This endpoint activates or deactivates the broadcaster’s Shield Mode.
    *   [channel.shield\_mode.begin](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelshield_modebegin)
         — This subscription type sends a notification when the broadcaster activates Shield Mode.
    *   [channel.shield\_mode.end](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelshield_modeend)
         — This subscription type sends a notification when the broadcaster deactivates Shield Mode.
2.  Added the `tags` field to the following endpoints:
    
    *   [Get Streams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-streams)
        
    *   [Get Followed Streams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-followed-streams)
        
    *   [Search Channels](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#search-channels)
        
    *   [Get Channel Information](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-information)
        
    
    The `tags` field contains the tags that the broadcaster or Twitch added to help identify the content that the broadcaster streams.
    
3.  Added the `tags` field to the [Modify Channel Information](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#modify-channel-information)
     endpoint to let broadcasters add or remove tags. Broadcasters use the tags to help identify the content that they stream.
4.  Added the `id` field to the [Get Charity Campaign Donations](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-charity-campaign-donations)
     response to identify the donation.
5.  Added the `id` field to the [Charity Donation](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference#charity-donation-event)
     event data to identify the donation.

2022‑12‑09

This release includes the following updates:

1.  Added the following missing status values that [Get EventSub Subscriptions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-eventsub-subscriptions)
     may return in the `status` field. All of these statuses indicate that the subscription is now disabled. You may also use the status values to filter the list of subscriptions that Get EventSub Subscriptions returns.
    *   **websocket\_disconnected** — The client closed the connection.
    *   **websocket\_failed\_ping\_pong** — The client failed to respond to a ping message.
    *   **websocket\_received\_inbound\_traffic** — The client sent a non-pong message. Clients may only send pong messages (and only in response to a ping message).
    *   **websocket\_connection\_unused** — The client failed to subscribe to events within the required time.
    *   **websocket\_internal\_error** — The Twitch WebSocket server experienced an unexpected error.
    *   **websocket\_network\_timeout** — The Twitch WebSocket server timed out writing the message to the client.
    *   **websocket\_network\_error** — The Twitch WebSocket server experienced a network error writing the message to the client.
    *   **moderator\_removed** — The moderator that authorized the subscription is no longer one of the broadcaster’s moderators.

2022‑12‑05

This release updates Twitch’s [CLI](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/cli)
 with the following changes:

1.  Adds the following events that you can trigger (see [Testing webhook events](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/cli/event-command)
    ).
    *   `charity-donation` — Triggers an event to mimic when a user donations to the broadcaster’s charity campaign.
    *   `charity-start` — Triggers an event to mimic when a broadcaster starts a charity campaign.
    *   `charity-progress` — Triggers an event to mimic when progress is made towards the campaign’s goal or when the broadcaster changes the fundraising goal.
    *   `charity-stop` — Triggers an event to mimic when a broadcaster stops a charity campaign.
2.  Adds the following flags that you can use with the charity events.
    *   `charity-current-value` — Use to specify the amount of money that’s donated for charity donation events or the current amount raised for the charity campaign events.
    *   `charity-target-value` — Use to specify the fundraising target amount for the charity campaign events.
3.  Changed the `user.update` event name in the documentation to `user-update` to match the convention used by the other events.

2022‑12‑02

This release includes the following updates to the Twitch [endpoints](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference)
:

1.  Added the [Update Shield Mode Status](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#update-shield-mode-status)
     endpoint, which activates or deactivates the broadcaster’s Shield Mode. Twitch’s Shield Mode feature is like a panic button that broadcasters can push to protect themselves from chat abuse coming from one or more accounts. When activated, Shield Mode applies the overrides that the broadcaster configured in the Twitch UX. If the broadcaster hasn’t configured Shield Mode, it applies default overrides.
2.  Added the [Get Shield Mode Status](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-shield-mode-status)
     endpoint, which gets the broadcaster’s Shield Mode activation status.
3.  Updated the status of the [Get Chatters](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-chatters)
     endpoint from Beta to generally available.

This release includes the following updates to the EventSub [subscription types](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types)
:

1.  Added the [channel.shield\_mode.begin](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelshield_modebegin)
     subscription type, which sends a notification when the broadcaster activates Shield Mode.
2.  Added the [channel.shield\_mode.end](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelshield_modebegin)
     subscription type, which sends a notification when the broadcaster deactivates Shield Mode.

2022‑11‑29

Updated the [Get Channel Information](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-information)
 endpoint to require a user access token to return the Partner’s stream delay value (see the `delay` field). By default, the `delay` field’s value is zero.

2022‑11‑22

Updated the [channel.charity\_campaign.stop](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaignstop)
 subscription type to include the following fields:

*   `charity_name`
*   `charity_description`
*   `charity_logo`
*   `charity_website`

Updated the [channel.charity\_campaign.donate](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaigndonate)
 and [channel.charity\_campaign.progress](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaignprogress)
 subscription types to include the following fields:

*   `charity_description`
*   `charity_website`

2022‑11‑21

Added the [IGDB](https://www.igdb.com/)
 ID to the [Get Games](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-games)
 and [Get Top Games](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-top-games)
 responses (see the `igdb_id` field).

Updated the Get Games endpoint to let you search by IGDB ID.

2022‑11‑17

Added the `user_id` and `user_name` fields to the [Get Chatters](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-chatters)
 response.

Added the [Get Charity Campaign Donations](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-charity-campaign-donations)
 endpoint, which returns the list of donations that users have made to the broadcaster’s active charity campaign.

Added the following subscription types to [EventSub](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub)
.

*   [channel.charity\_campaign.start](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaignstart)
     — Sends a notification when the broadcaster starts a charity campaign.
*   [channel.charity\_campaign.progress](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaignprogress)
     — Sends a notification when the broadcaster changes the fundraiser’s target goal or when progress is made towards the goal.
*   [channel.charity\_campaign.stop](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaignstop)
     — Sends a notification when the broadcaster stops a charity campaign.
    
*   Added `version_removed` as a possible status value to EventSub. The subscription’s `status` field is set to `version_removed` if EventSub stops supporting the subscribed to subscription type and version. EventSub sends the status in a revocation message.

2022‑11‑04

This release includes the following updates:

1.  Updated the CLI’s [Generating Mock Data and Starting the Server](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/cli/mock-api-command)
     topic to remove the erroneous `user_id` parameter from the table under **Getting an app access token**.
    
2.  Updated the [Get Hype Train Events](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-hype-train-events)
     endpoint to include the following new contribution type:
    
    *   OTHER — Covers contribution methods other than Bits and Subscriptions. See the `type` field under the `last_contribution` and `top_contributions` fields.
    
    Updated the [begin](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference#hype-train-begin-event)
    , [progress](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference#hype-train-progress-event)
    , and [end](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference#hype-train-end-event)
     Hype Train events to include the following new contribution type:
    
    *   other — Covers contribution methods other than Bits and Subscriptions. See the `type` field under the `last_contribution` and `top_contributions` fields.
3.  Added the [Broadcast Scheduling Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/schedule)
    .
    

2022‑11‑02

Updated the [channel.charity\_campaign.donate](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaigndonate)
 subscription type to include the following fields in the event’s data:

*   `charity_name` — The charity’s name.
*   `charity_logo` — A URL to the charity’s logo.

2022‑11‑01

Added WebSocket support for [EventSub](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub)
 notifications. See [Handling WebSocket Events](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/handling-websocket-events)
.

Updated the [Twitch CLI](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/cli)
 to support testing your WebSocket client (you’ll need to upgrade to the latest version). The server sends the client a [welcome](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/handling-websocket-events#welcome-message)
 message followed by [ping](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/handling-websocket-events#ping-message)
 and [keepalive](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/handling-websocket-events#keepalive-message)
 messages. You’ll mostly use the mock server to send a [reconnect](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/handling-websocket-events#reconnect-message)
 message to test your client’s reconnect code flow. For details, see the [start-websocket-server](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/cli/websocket-event-command)
 sub-command.

Updated the [Transport](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference/#transport)
 object that you use to [subscribe](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#create-eventsub-subscription)
 to events:

*   Added **websocket** as a possible value to the `method` field.
*   Require the `callback` field only if the `method` field is set to **webhook**.
*   Require the `secret` field only if the `method` field is set to **webhook**.
*   Add the `session_id` field, which identifies the WebSocket to send notifications to. This field is required only if the `method` field is set to **websocket**.
*   Added the `connected_at` field, which contains the UTC date and time that the WebSocket connection was established. This is a response-only field that [Create EventSub Subscription](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#create-eventsub-subscription)
     and [Get EventSub Subscription](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-eventsub-subscriptions)
     returns if the `method` field is set to **websocket**.
*   Added the `disconnected_at` field, which contains the UTC date and time that the WebSocket connection was lost. This is a response-only field that [Get EventSub Subscription](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-eventsub-subscriptions)
     returns if the `method` field is set to **websocket**.

2022‑09‑29

Added the [Get Chatters](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-chatters)
 endpoint, which you use to get the list of users that are connected to the specified broadcaster’s chat session.

2022‑09‑16

**Breaking change to the Beta [channel.charity\_campaign.donate](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaigndonate)
 EventSub subscription type**:

The `id` field of the [Charity Donation Event](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference/#charity-donation-event)
 object will change to `campaign_id` to better reflect its content on Tuesday, September 20 at 1:00pm PDT.

2022‑09‑01

Updated the [Create Poll](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#create-poll)
 endpoint to remove support for voting with Bits. This change removes the following optional request fields from the documentation:

*   `bits_voting_enabled`
*   `bits_per_vote`

If your request includes these fields, the endpoint ignores them. The following response fields will be set to default values.

*   `bits_votes` — set to 0.
*   `bits_voting_enabled` — set to **false**.
*   `bits_per_vote` — set to 0.

The [Get Polls](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-polls)
 and [End Poll](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#end-poll)
 responses will show the above values for polls created on or after August 29, 2022; otherwise, the response contains Bits values if enabled.

The above Bits-related fields should also be ignored for the following EventSub events:

*   [channel.poll.begin](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpollbegin)
    
*   [channel.poll.progress](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpollprogress)
    
*   [channel.poll.end](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpollend)
    

2022‑08‑26

Added the `vip` tag to [PRIVMSG](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc/tags#privmsg-tags)
. You can use the tag to determine whether the user that sent the chat is a VIP.

2022‑08‑25

Adds the following API and subscription type that you can use to get information about the charity campaign that the broadcaster is running.

*   [Get Charity Campaign](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-charity-campaign)
     — Gets information about the charity campaign that the broadcaster is running, such as their fundraising goal and the amount that’s been donated so far.
*   [channel.charity\_campaign.donate](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelcharity_campaigndonate)
     — Sends an event notification when a user donates to the broadcaster’s charity campaign.

2022‑08‑12

Added the [Moderation Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/moderation)
 that shows how to use the moderation APIs such as adding and removing moderators, banning users or putting them in a timeout, and updating your AutoMod settings.

2022‑07‑29

All Twitch API endpoints introduced on 2022-07-15 have moved from public beta to general availability.

2022‑07‑22

Added the following guides:

*   [Creating Clips](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/clips)
     — Shows how to create and get clips.
*   [Creating Markers](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/markers)
     — Shows how to create and get stream markers.

2022‑07‑20

Added the `vod_offset` field to the [Get Clips](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-clips)
 API response. The offset is the number of seconds from the start of the video to the beginning of the clip.

Updated the list of possible values that the `type` field in the [Get Creator Goals](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-creator-goals)
 API response may be set to. The following values were added to the list:

*   subscription\_count — The goal is to increase subscriptions. This type shows the net increase or decrease in the number of subscriptions.
*   new\_subscription\_count — The goal is to increase subscriptions. This type shows only the net increase in the number of subscriptions (it does not account for users that unsubscribed since the goal started).

2022‑07‑15

This release adds the following endpoints. See :

*   [Send Chat Announcement](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#send-chat-announcement)
     — Sends an announcement to the broadcaster’s chat room.
*   [Delete Chat Messages](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#delete-chat-messages)
     — Removes a single chat message or all chat messages from the broadcaster’s chat room.
*   [Update User Chat Color](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#update-user-chat-color)
     — Updates the color used for the user’s name in chat.
*   [Get User Chat Color](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-user-chat-color)
     — Gets the color used for the user’s name in chat.
*   [Add Channel Moderator](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#add-channel-moderator)
     — Adds a moderator to the broadcaster’s chat room.
*   [Remove Channel Moderator](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#remove-channel-moderator)
     — Removes a moderator from the broadcaster’s chat room.
*   [Get VIPs](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-vips)
     — Gets a list of the channel’s VIPs.
*   [Add Channel VIP](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#add-channel-vip)
     — Adds a VIP to the broadcaster’s chat room.
*   [Remove Channel VIP](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#remove-channel-vip)
     — Removes a VIP from the broadcaster’s chat room.
*   [Send Whisper](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#send-whisper)
     — Sends a whisper message to the specified user.

The following [authentication scopes](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication/scopes)
 have also been added for the endpoints above:

*   `moderator:manage:announcements`
*   `moderator:manage:chat_messages`
*   `user:manage:chat_color`
*   `channel:manage:moderators`
*   `channel:read:vips`
*   `channel:manage:vips`
*   `user:manage:whispers`

2022‑07‑11

[Submission Best Practices](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/submission-best-practices)
 - Updated the “Content in Extensions” section to define the expected functionality of global overlay Extensions and examples.

2022‑06‑29

[Twitch API](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api)
 - Organization and content for this section has been improved for a better developer experience.

[Twitch Drops](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/ja/drops)
 - Japanese localization added.

2022‑06‑27

[Check AutoMod Status](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#check-automod-status)
 — Includes the following changes:

*   Deprecated and removed the `user_id` field from the request body. The endpoint ignores the field if you include it.
*   Added endpoint-specific rate limits.

For information about these changes, see [Upcoming changes to the Check AutoMod Status API](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/upcoming-changes-to-the-check-automod-status-api-endpoint/38512)
.

[Get Users](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-users)
 — Includes the following change:

*   Deprecated the `view_count` field in the response. The response continues to include the field; however, it contains stale data. You should stop displaying this data at your earliest convenience.

[Start a Raid](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#start-a-raid)
, [Cancel a Raid](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#cancel-a-raid)
 — Includes the following change:

*   These endpoints were removed from Beta and are now generally available (replaced the Beta tag to New).

[Get EventSub Subscriptions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-eventsub-subscriptions)
 — Includes the following change:

*   Added the _user\_id_ query parameter that you can use to filter your list of subscriptions by. The response contains subscriptions where the user ID matches a user ID that you specified in the **Condition** object when you [created the subscription](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#create-eventsub-subscription)
    .

**BREAKING CHANGES**

[Get Soundtrack Playlist](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-soundtrack-playlist)
 — Removed the following playlist fields from the response:

*   `description`
*   `id`
*   `image_url`
*   `title`
*   `tracks` (the `data` field now contains the playlist’s tracks)

[Get Soundtrack Playlists](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-soundtrack-playlists)
 — Added the _id_ query parameter, which you can use to get metadata information about a single playlist.

2022‑06‑08

Added the ability for your application to start or cancel a raid. [Read more](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/raids)

This update adds the following endpoints:

*   [Start a Raid](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#start-a-raid)
    
*   [Cancel a Raid](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#cancel-a-raid)
    

Added the `created_at` field to the response object of the following endpoints:

*   [Ban User](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#ban-user)
    
*   [Get Banned Users](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-banned-users)
    

2022‑06‑02

[Create Prediction](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#create-prediction)
 - Updated to allow specifying up to ten outcomes.

2022‑05‑17

Added fields to the following EventSub subscription types:

*   [user.update](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#userupdate)
     — Added the `email_verified` field, which indicates whether Twitch has verified the user’s email.
*   [channel.ban](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelban)
     — Added the `banned_at` field, which indicates the UTC date and time of when the user was banned or put in a timeout.
*   [channel.hype\_train.begin](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelhype_trainbegin)
     — Added the `level` field, which indicates the level at which the Hype Train started.

[Extension Guidelines and Policies](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/guidelines-and-policies)
 - Added section 4.11 regarding NFTs in Twitch Extensions.

2022‑05‑09

[Extension Submission Best Practices](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/submission-best-practices)

*   Added a section for content in Extensions
*   Amended the quicker reviews section with information regarding what types of domains are valid for an Extension’s content security policy allowlists.

[Extension Guidelines and Policies](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/guidelines-and-policies)

*   Added section 4.10 regarding global overlay Extensions. See more details in [our announcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/new-extensions-policy-for-global-overlay-extensions/37286/8)
    .
*   Added section 2.13 to regarding what types of domains are valid for an Extension’s content security policy allowlists

2022‑04‑29

[Chat & Chatbots](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc)
 - Organization and content for this section has been improved for a better developer experience.

2022‑04‑13

Added 409 Conflict as a possible response code to [Ban User](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#ban-user)
 and [Unban User](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#unban-user)
.

Added information about when the Twitch API may introduce breaking and non-breaking changes to the API. For details, see [Breaking Changes](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/guide#breaking-changes)
.

2022‑04‑12

Enhanced Experiences and Event-based Drops have been [decommissioned](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/c/announcements)
 and documentation has been removed.

2022‑04‑07

[Authentication](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication)
 - Organization and writing for this section has been improved for a better developer experience.

[Get Hype Train Events](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-hype-train-events)
 - Removed `id` query parameter. See the [deprecation announcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/get-hype-train-events-api-endpoint-id-query-parameter-deprecation/37613)
 for more information.

2022‑03‑18

Removed documentation for “Get Banned Events” and “Get Moderator Events” Twitch API endpoints. For more information about the deprecation and removal of these endpoints, see the [deprecation announcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/deprecation-of-twitch-api-event-endpoints-that-supported-websub-based-webhooks/35137)
.

2022‑02‑28

Twitch API v5 endpoints (i.e. kraken) are no longer available. Documentation for these endpoints have been removed.

2022‑02‑25

[Chat msg-id tags](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc/msg-id)
 updated for accuracy.

2022‑02‑11

Updated the [Chatbots](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc)
 content with the following changes:

*   Replaced the /r9kbeta and /r9kbetaoff [Twitch chat commands](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc/chat-commands)
     to /uniquechat and /uniquechatoff, respectively, to match the commands used in Twitch Chat. The /r9kbeta and /r9kbetaoff continue to work but you should start using /uniquechat and /uniquechatoff at your earliest convenience.
    
*   Removed the following tags from the list of possible [USERNOTICE tags](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc/tags#usernotice-tags)
    :
    
    *   anonsubgift
    *   anonsubmysterygift
*   Added the `WHISPER` command to the [list of commands](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc/commands#whisper)
     that the Twitch IRC server may send your bot.
    

2022‑02‑08

[Get channel information](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-information)
 endpoint

*   Changed the description for the `broadcaster_id` query parameter to indicate that you may specify a maximum of 100 IDs.

[Get Soundtrack Current Track](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-soundtrack-current-track)
 endpoint

*   Changed the description for the `data` response field to remove the part that states that the list is empty if the broadcaster is not playing a track. The correct behavior is that if the broadcaster is not playing a track, the endpoint returns HTTP status code 404 Not Found.
*   Changed the description for the `creator_channel_id` response field to indicate that its value is an empty string if a Twitch user didn’t create the track instead of **null**.

[Get Soundtrack Playlist](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-soundtrack-playlist)
 endpoint

*   Changed the description for the `creator_channel_id` response field to indicate that its value is an empty string if a Twitch user didn’t create the track instead of **null**.

[Extension Policy 2.9](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/guidelines-and-policies)
 updated to clarify that the Twitch Extension Helper must be included as the first script in all front-end HTML files.

2022‑01‑21

[Restrictions on content](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/#restrictions-on-content)
 updated to reflect the new Twitch Extensions policy for [Content Security Policy (CSP) directives and enforcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/new-extensions-policy-for-content-security-policy-csp-directives-and-timeline-for-enforcement/33695)
.

[Moderation API endpoints](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#ban-user)
 have moved from public beta to generally available.

2022‑01‑06

Added the `new_subscription` Creator Goals type, which reports all new subscriptions since the goal’s inception. This type differs from the `subscription` type, which reports the net increase or decrease in subscriptions. See the `type` field of:

*   [Goals Event](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference#goals-event)
    
*   [Get Creator Goals](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-creator-goals)
    

2021‑12‑16

The [Update Chat Settings](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#update-chat-settings)
 endpoint now lets you:

*   Set the `follower_mode_duration` field to any value between 0 and 129600, inclusive.
*   Set the `slow_mode_wait_time` field to any value between 3 and 120, inclusive.

Open beta changes:

*   For [Ban Users](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#ban-user)
    , bulk requests have been removed until a more scalable solution is available.
*   For [Ban Users](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#ban-user)
     and [Unban User](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#unban-user)
    , error message formatting now utilizes the same structure as other API endpoints since bulk requests have been removed. HTTP 429 errors may also be returned if there are too many requests even within normal Twitch API rate limits.

2021‑12‑09

Added the following Soundtrack APIs:

1.  [Get Soundtrack Current Track](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-soundtrack-current-track)
     — Gets the Soundtrack track that the specified broadcaster is playing.
2.  [Get Soundtrack Playlists](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-soundtrack-playlists)
     — Gets the list of Soundtrack playlists.
3.  [Get Soundtrack Playlist](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-soundtrack-playlist)
     — Gets the specified Soundtrack playlist.

2021‑12‑03

Updated [Organizations](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/companies)
 to reflect [cover art powered by IGDB](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/c/announcements)
.

Updates [Product Lifecycle](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/product-lifecycle)
 to include [the deprecation](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/deprecation-of-twitch-api-event-endpoints-that-supported-websub-based-webhooks/35137)
 of a few Twitch API endpoints that supported WebSub-based webhooks.

2021‑11‑23

Added the following chat and moderation APIs that let developers create experiences that help broadcasters combat harassment and hate raids.

| What do you want to do? | How to do it… |
| --- | --- |
| Ban users or put them in a timeout | Send a [POST /moderation/bans](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#ban-user)<br> request.  <br>  <br>You can also [remove](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#unban-user)<br> a ban or timeout. |
| Block terms that the broadcaster doesn’t want used in their chat room | Send a [POST /moderation/blocked\_terms](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#add-blocked-term)<br> request.  <br>  <br>You can also [get](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-blocked-terms)<br> a list of blocked terms and [delete](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#remove-blocked-term)<br> blocked terms. |
| Update the broadcaster’s AutoMod settings | Send a [PUT /moderation/automod/settings](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#update-automod-settings)<br> request.  <br>  <br>You can also [get](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-automod-settings)<br> a list of the current AutoMod settings. |
| Update the broadcaster’s chat settings | Send a [PATCH /chat/settings](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#update-chat-settings)<br> request.  <br>  <br>You can also [get](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-chat-settings)<br> a list of the current chat settings. |

2021‑11‑09

Reorganization of EventSub documentation, moving [handling events](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/handling-webhook-events)
 to a dedicated page.

Explicitly including the “Content-Type: application/json” header in [API reference](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference)
 examples.

2021‑10‑27

[Organization Management](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/companies)
 updated to reflect IGDB will power Twitch game cover art as of November 17, 2021.

2021‑10‑20

Added documenation for Twitch’s [command-line interface](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/cli)
 (CLI).

2021‑10‑01

Added the `points` field to the [Get Broadcaster Subscriptions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-broadcaster-subscriptions)
 response. This field provides the current number of subscriber points earned by this broadcaster.

2021‑09‑30

[Extensions Policy 2.12](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/guidelines-and-policies)
 has been added in regards to defining the domains from which Twitch Extensions can load content. More information is available in the announcement, [New Extensions policy for Content Security Policy (CSP) directives and timeline for enforcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/c/announcements/13)
.

[Get started with Twitch Extensions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions)
 - “Restrictions on content” section updated to reflect Extensions policy 2.12 and the timeline mentioned in the announcement.

2021‑09‑29

[Drops Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/drops)
 received minor updates.

2021‑09‑24

Reformatted Goals [EventSub Subscription Types](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types)
 for consistency.

Retitled the “Get Live Channels” to “[Get Extension Live Channels](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-extension-live-channels)
” to clarify the endpoint is specific to Extensions activated on live channels.

2021‑09‑16

Decommissioned WebSub-based webhooks, which resulted in the following documentation changes:

*   Removed the **Get Webhook Subscriptions** endpoint from the [reference](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference)
    .
*   Deleted the Webhooks Guide and Webhooks Reference topics.
*   Updated the [Product Lifecycle](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/product-lifecycle)
     topic to note the date that WebSub-based webhooks was decommissioned.

2021‑09‑15

The Creator Goals feature is now generally available. Broadcasters create goals to generate hype in their community, and it provides the community a way to support the channel. Goals can be daily goals, subathons, or anything in between. For information about using the API to get goals or receive notifications about goals, see [Creator Goals](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/goals)
.

2021‑09‑10

Minor updates to address [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/twitchdev/issues/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22product%3A+docs%22)
.

[Insights & Analytics](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/insights)
 – Directions to access Drops Analytics has been updated and the “Top Streamers” report has been removed.

2021‑09‑01

Added the Creator Goals API, which returns active goals that broadcasters create on Twitch. Broadcasters create these goals to generate hype in their community, and it provides the community a way to support the channel. Goals can be daily goals, subathons, or anything in between. For more information, see [Creator Goals](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/goals)
.

2021‑08‑30

[Twitch API Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/guide)
 - Technical concepts in this guide have been updated or added to for further clarification.

[Embedding Twitch](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/embed)
 - Updated to include that certain features may be disabled if the embedded iframe is obscured.

[Embedding Video and Clips](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/embed/video-and-clips)
 - Updated description for `seek` function and added the SEEK event.

2021‑08‑20

Updated examples for [validating](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication/validate-tokens)
 and [revoking](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication/revoke-tokens)
 OAuth tokens.

Updated [Extension Helper Library](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/building#extension-helper-library)
 to clarify that all HTML files should include the Extension Helper.

2021‑08‑13

Added the following fields to the [Get Channel Emotes](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-emotes)
, [Get Global Emotes](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-global-emotes)
, and [Get Emote Sets](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-emote-sets)
 endpoints.

*   `format` — The formats that the emote is available in. For example, PNG or animated GIF.
*   `scale` — The sizes that the emote is available in. For example, 1.0 (small).
*   `theme_mode` — The background themes that the emote is available in. For example, light.
*   `template` — The URL template that you use to create a URL for fetching the emote.

For information about how to use these fields, see [Twitch Emotes](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc/emotes)
.

Added the following to the [Chatbots & IRC Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc)
.

*   Existing site-wide rate limit for verified bots
*   Clarification in the `JOIN` section regarding expected behavior when exceeding rate limits for joining channels

2021‑07‑30

[Get Started with the Twitch API](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api)
 - This API guide has been updated to use the Twitch CLI and simplify how to retrieve an OAuth token to improve the getting started experience.

2021‑07‑27

The Create and Delete Follows API endpoints have been removed. See the [Deprecation of Create and Delete Follows API Endpoints](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/deprecation-of-create-and-delete-follows-api-endpoints/32351)
 announcement for more information.

2021‑07‑26

[Twitch Chat Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc#verified-bots)
 - Updated information regarding verified chatbots including rate limits. Known bots have been removed. More information can be found in the [chatbot verification update announcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/an-update-for-the-delayed-bot-verification-request-process/32325)
.

2021‑07‑23

[Get Banned Users](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-banned-users)
 and “Get Banned Events” updated to include ban reason and information for the moderator who initiated the ban.

[Twitch Emotes Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc/emotes/)
 - Added to document how developers can customize Twitch Emote image URLs to optimize their rendering in third-party applications.

With the addition of the guide above, the “Chatbots & IRC” navigation item has been retitled to “Chat & Chatbots” to include a broader range of chat topics.

2021‑07‑15

[v5 Migration Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/migration)
 - Updated to include additional migration paths and indicated endpoints that are not supported beyond v5.

2021‑07‑13

[Using the Twitch API in an Extension Front End](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/frontend-api-usage/)
 - Added to describe how to a JWT can be used to make Twitch API requests from an Extension front end.

The following Extension-related Twitch API endpoints have been added:

*   [Get Extension Configuration Segment](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-extension-configuration-segment)
    
*   [Set Extension Configuration Segment](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#set-extension-configuration-segment)
    
*   [Set Extension Required Configuration](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#set-extension-required-configuration)
    
*   [Send Extension PubSub Message](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#send-extension-pubsub-message)
    
*   [Get Extension Live Channels](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-extension-live-channels)
    
*   [Get Extension Secrets](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-extension-secrets)
    
*   [Create Extension Secret](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#create-extension-secret)
    
*   [Send Extension Chat Message](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#send-extension-chat-message)
    
*   [Get Extensions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-extensions)
    
*   [Get Released Extensions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-released-extensions)
    
*   [Get Extension Bits Products](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-extension-bits-products)
    
*   [Update Extension Bits Product](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#update-extension-bits-product)
    

2021‑07‑02

[Twitch IRC: Tags](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc/tags)
 - Minor updates, deprecated tags removed, and chat replies added.

2021‑06‑30

Enhanced Experiences and Event-based Drops are now generally available.

[Get Drops Entitlements](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-drops-entitlements)
 - Updated to include `fulfillment_status`.

[Update Drops Entitlements](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#update-drops-entitlements)
 - Added to the Twitch API reference.

[User Authorization Grant](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#userauthorizationgrant)
 EventSub subscription type added as v1.

[Drops](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/drops)
 guide - Minor changes and updates regarding the additions above.

2021‑06‑25

[Drop Entitlement Grant](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#dropentitlementgrant)
 EventSub subscription type added.

Update regarding the temporary pause of chatbot verification added to the [Twitch Chat Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc#verified-bots)
.

2021‑06‑17

[Get Channel Chat Badges](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-chat-badges)
 - Now supports OAuth app access tokens in addition to OAuth user access tokens.

EventSub - [Channel Subscription End Event](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference/#channel-subscription-end-event)
 added `tier` and `is_gift`.

[Authentication](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication/scopes)
 - The existing `user:read:email` scope has been added.

2021‑06‑15

Twitch API endpoints added for Twitch channel stream schedule.

*   [Get Channel Stream Schedule](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-channel-stream-schedule)
    
*   [Get Channel iCalendar](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-channel-icalendar)
    
*   [Update Channel Stream Schedule](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#update-channel-stream-schedule)
    
*   [Create Channel Stream Schedule Segment](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#create-channel-stream-schedule-segment)
    
*   [Update Channel Stream Schedule Segment](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#update-channel-stream-schedule-segment)
    
*   [Delete Channel Stream Schedule Segment](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#delete-channel-stream-schedule-segment)
    

[Channel Subscription Message](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelsubscriptionmessage)
 has moved from public beta to v1.

2021‑06‑11

[Channel Subscription Gift](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelsubscriptiongift)
 has moved from public beta to v1.

[Get Videos](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-videos)
 updated to explicitly mention the 500 results limit when specifying `game_id`.

2021‑06‑08

Twitch API endpoints added for Twitch Emotes.

*   [Get Channel Emotes](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-emotes)
    
*   [Get Global Emotes](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-global-emotes)
    
*   [Get Emote Sets](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-emote-sets)
    

2021‑06‑07

[Channel Subscription Message](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelsubscriptionmessage)
 EventSub subscription type added as a public beta.

[Extension Bits Transaction Create](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#extensionbits_transactioncreate)
 EventSub subscription type has moved from public beta to version 1.

2021‑06‑03

Channel Subscription Gift EventSub subscription type - Added `is_anonymous` boolean to the event.

[AutoMod Queue](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/pubsub#example-automod-queue-message)
 and [User Moderation Notifications](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/pubsub#example-user-moderation-notification-message)
 PubSub topics - Examples updated for accuracy.

Several [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/twitchdev/issues/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22product%3A+docs%22)
 resolved for documentation.

2021‑06‑02

[Get Broadcaster Subscriptions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-broadcaster-subscriptions)
 - `total` subscription count added to the response.

2021‑05‑28

Twitch API endpoints have been added for chat badges.

*   [Get Channel Chat Badges](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-chat-badges)
    
*   [Get Global Chat Badges](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-global-chat-badges)
    

EventSub subscription type updates.

*   [Channel Subscription End](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelsubscriptionend)
     has moved from public beta to v1. This was previously known as “Channel Unsubscribe.”
*   [Channel Subscription Gift](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelsubscriptiongift)
     has been added as a public beta.

2021‑05‑24

[Polls](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-polls)
 and [Channel Points Predictions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-predictions)
 Twitch API endpoints have moved from public beta to general availability.

[Polls](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpollbegin)
 and [Channel Points Predictions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpredictionbegin)
 EventSub subscription types have moved from public beta to version 1.

AutoMod Queue and User Moderation Notification topics added to [PubSub reference](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/pubsub/)
.

2021‑05‑21

[Extension Bits Transaction Create](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#extensionbits_transactioncreate)
 EventSub subscription type has been added as a public beta.

[Channel Points Custom Rewards](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#create-custom-rewards)
 - The API reference for Custom Rewards endpoints has been updated for consistency and to clarify conditional requirements for body parameters. For example, `max_per_stream` is required if a value for `is_max_per_stream_enabled` is also provided.

2021‑05‑14

[Channel Prediction Lock](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelpredictionlock)
 EventSub subscription type - corrected the name of the lock timestamp to `locked_at`.

[Channel Prediction End](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelpredictionend)
 EventSub subscription type - removed the `locked_at` field due to edge cases with Predictions that are cancelled or closed early.

[Create EventSub Subscription](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#create-eventsub-subscription)
 and [Get EventSub Subscriptions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-eventsub-subscriptions)
 - `limit` removed following the new [EventSub subscription limit cost-based system](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/eventsub-subscription-limit-cost-based-system-and-limit-field-deprecation/31377)
.

[Get Channel Information](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-information)
 - Added `delay` to return values table and example payload.

2021‑05‑12

[Manage Held AutoMod Messages](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#manage-held-automod-messages)
 – Added to the Twitch API reference.

[Authentication](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication/scopes)
 - `moderator:manage:automod` scope added for [Manage Held AutoMod Messages](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#manage-held-automod-messages)
.

2021‑05‑06

[Channel Subscription End](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelsubscriptionend)
 EventSub subscription type has been added as a public beta.

_This entry has been updated, the subscription type has been renamed from “Channel Unsubscribe” to “Channel Subscription End” after moving from beta to v1._

2021‑05‑03

Twitch API endpoints added for polls and Channel Points Predictions as a public beta.

*   [Get Polls](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-polls)
    
*   [Create Poll](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#create-poll)
    
*   [End Poll](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#end-poll)
    
*   [Get Predictions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-predictions)
    
*   [Create Prediction](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#create-prediction)
    
*   [End Prediction](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#end-prediction)
    

EventSub subscriptions types added for polls and Channel Points Predictions as a public beta.

*   [Channel Poll Begin](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpollbegin)
    
*   [Channel Poll Progress](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpollprogress)
    
*   [Channel Poll End](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpollend)
    
*   [Channel Prediction Begin](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpredictionbegin)
    
*   [Channel Prediction Progress](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpredictionprogress)
    
*   [Channel Prediction Lock](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpredictionlock)
    
*   [Channel Prediction End](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelpredictionend)
    

2021‑04‑30

[Overview page](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/)
 - New information and organization.

[EventSub Subscriptions Types](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#public-beta-program)
 - Added information regarding the expected availability of EventSub subscription types when released as a public beta.

2021‑04‑26

[Notification Example](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#userauthorizationrevoke)
 for `user.authorization.revoke` updated to show the cost is 1.

[Embedding Twitch](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/embed)
 - Minor documentation updates.

2021‑04‑20

[Get Followed Streams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-followed-streams)
 - Added to the Twitch API reference.

[Authentication](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication/scopes)
 - `user:read:follows` scope added for [Get Followed Streams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-followed-streams)
.

[v5 Migration Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/migration)
 - Updated to mention [Get Followed Streams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-followed-streams)
 equivalence.

2021‑04‑15

[Modify Channel Information](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#modify-channel-information)
 – `delay` added as an optional body parameter.

New API response fields added

*   [Get Streams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-streams)
    : `is_mature`
*   [Get Clips](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-clips)
    : `duration`
*   [Search Channels](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#search-channels)
    : `game_name`
*   [Get Videos](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-videos)
    : `stream_id`
*   [Get Videos](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-videos)
    : `muted_segments` array of objects with `duration` and `offset`

2021‑04‑09

[Get Broadcaster Subscriptions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-broadcaster-subscriptions)
 - Added context for how a Twitch Extension can retrieve this information.

[Update User](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#update-user)
 - Clarifying why `description` is optional and what results if not provided.

Extensions Reference - Parameter tables reordered to match the order they should be passed into their respective functions.

Other minor corrections.

2021‑04‑05

Twitch Quarterly Insights has been decommissioned and removed in favor of [Game Developer Analytics](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/insights#game-developer-analytics)
.

2021‑03‑31

Viewer Heartbeat Service (VHS) v5 endpoints removed in association with the decommission of legacy Drops.

2021‑03‑30

[Organizations](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/companies)
 updated to include information regarding joining multiple organizations, as well as minor updates.

2021‑03‑26

EventSub’s [Channel Moderator Add](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelmoderatoradd)
 and [Channel Moderator Remove](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelmoderatorremove)
 subscriptions types have been moved from beta to v1.

Added associated Twitch API endpoints to the [scopes section](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication/scopes)
 of the Authentication guide.

Minor design improvements.

2021‑03‑19

[Get Drops Entitlements](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-drops-entitlements)

*   The maximum value for the number of items return via the `first` parameter has been increased to 1000.
*   Pagination updated for accuracy in the the return values table and the example payload.

Webhooks example payloads updated for accuracy.

Miscellaneous corrections.

2021‑03‑12

Added [Check User Subscription](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#check-user-subscription)
 to the Twitch API.

EventSub’s cost-based system for [subscription limits](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/manage-subscriptions/#subscription-limits)
 has been added. Thanks for the feedback on [RFC 0014](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/rfc-0014-eventsub-subscription-limit-changes/30312/)
.

Improved the instructions and information regarding the creation of Twitch applications for [Drops campaigns](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/drops)
.

Several documentation corrections received through GitHub Issues have been resolved.

2021‑03‑04

Twitch API

*   [Get Channel Teams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-channel-teams)
     has been added to the API reference.
*   [Get Teams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-teams)
     has been added to the API reference.
*   The v5 migration guide has been updated to include the new Get Teams endpoint.

EventSub

*   The [Channel Raid](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelraid)
     subscription type has been moved from beta to v1.
*   The [Channel Moderator Add](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelmoderatoradd)
     and [Channel Moderator Remove](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types/#channelmoderatorremove)
     subscription types have been added as a public beta.

2021‑02‑26

EventSub updates

*   Added clarification in steps 4-5 on “Create a subscription.”
*   [Channel Follow](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference#channel-follow-event)
     now includes the timestamp of when the follow occurred.
*   Clarified the `id` field in the [EventSub Stream Online](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference#stream-online-event)
     notification payload.

The following endpoints were updated to use the `channel:manage:broadcast` scope. The previous scope remains valid.

*   [Modify Channel Information](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#modify-channel-information)
    
*   [Create Stream Marker](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#create-stream-marker)
    
*   [Replace Stream Tags](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#replace-stream-tags)
    

Updated the v5 Video Upload Guide introduction for visitors looking for information regarding uploads via the Creator Dashboard.

Fixed broken links in [chat](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc)
 references.

Removed the “Create Entitlement Grants Upload URL” Twitch API endpoint associated with a previous version of Twitch Drops.

2021‑02‑22

Legacy Drops have been removed following the [announced decommission](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/announcing-a-new-version-of-drops-for-game-developers/27771)
.

2021‑02‑19

`status` added to EventSub [subscription objects](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types)
.

Scope for [Channel Subscriptions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/pubsub#topics)
 in PubSub has been updated to `channel:read:subscriptions`. Previous scope remains valid.

[Channel Points Hackathon](https://twitchchannelpoints.devpost.com/?utm_source=twitch&utm_medium=docs)
 banner added.

Further clarification for `game_id` and `title` added for [Modify Channel Information](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#modify-channel-information)
.

Minor updates to the [API guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/guide)
 and [Chat guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc)
.

2021‑02‑12

[EventSub Channel Ban](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelban)
 v1 now includes moderator information, reason for ban, and timeout duration if the ban was a timeout.

[EventSub Channel Unban](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types#channelunban)
 v1 now includes moderator information.

Section 7.5 of the [Extensions Guidelines and Policies](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/guidelines-and-policies)
 has been removed following the [original announcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/extension-policy-update-moderation/30215)
.

2021‑02‑09

In EventSub, the authorization scopes allowed for all Channel Point subscription types have been updated to accept `channel:read:redemptions` or `channel:manage:redemptions`.

Updated [Get Users](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-users)
 to correctly document `created_at` in the example.

Minor editorial updates to the [Extensions Monetization Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/monetization)
.

2021‑02‑05

Eventsub API endpoints have been moved to the [API reference](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference)
.

A message regarding the deprecation of Twitch Quarterly Insights has been added to [Insights](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/insights)
 following the recent [announcement](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/deprecation-of-the-quarterly-insights-report/30266/2)
.

Explicitly stating in [Extensions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions)
 that files should be zipped together as opposed to zipping the directory containing the files.

Miscellaneous UserVoice and GitHub Issues addressed.

2021‑01‑29

EventSub

*   The Channel Raid subscription type has been added as a public beta.
*   The `started_at` timestamp has been added to the [Stream Online Event](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-reference#stream-online-event)
    .

A note about removing [Extensions Policy 7.5](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/guidelines-and-policies)
 has been added since Twitch Extensions no longer load for banned users.

The [Drops guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/drops)
 now includes a section regarding thoughtful naming of campaigns and rewards.

[Product Lifecycle](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/product-lifecycle)
 has been updated to include definitions for tagging functionality in the documentation.

2021‑01‑28

`broadcaster_login` and/or `user_login` added to multiple API endpoint payloads that already return user ID and display name.

*   [GET helix/bits/leaderboard](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-bits-leaderboard)
    
*   [GET helix/channel\_points/custom\_rewards](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-custom-reward)
    
*   [PATCH helix/channel\_points/custom\_rewards](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#update-custom-reward)
    
*   [POST helix/channel\_points/custom\_rewards](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#create-custom-rewards)
    
*   [GET helix/channel\_points/custom\_rewards/redemptions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-custom-reward-redemption)
    
*   [PATCH helix/channel\_points/custom\_rewards/redemptions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#update-redemption-status)
    
*   [GET helix/extensions/transactions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-extension-transactions)
    
*   [GET helix/moderation/banned](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-banned-users)
    
*   GET helix/moderation/banned/events
*   [GET helix/moderation/moderators](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-moderators)
    
*   GET helix/moderation/moderators/events
*   [GET helix/search/channels](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#search-channels)
    
*   [GET helix/streams](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-streams)
    
*   [GET helix/streams/markers](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-stream-markers)
    
*   [GET helix/videos](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-videos)
    
*   [GET helix/users/follows](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-users-follows)
    

2021‑01‑22

EventSub:

*   Corrected `status` value in examples.
*   Clarified requirements for `secret`.

[Authentication](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication)
 updates:

*   Correctly state a `400 Bad Request` is returned when attempting to revoke an invalid token, rather than a `200 OK`.
*   Scope information corrections and updates.

Additional updates:

*   `offset` removed from Get Channel Followers endpoint in v5 as it is no longer supported. `cursor` should be used for pagination.
*   Extensions tutorial updated to use Gists instead of image.
*   Several UserVoice suggestions and GitHub Issues addressed.

2021‑01‑15

New Twitch API endpoints available:

*   [Get Channel Editors](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-channel-editors)
    
*   [Delete Videos](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#delete-videos)
    
*   [Get User Block List](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-user-block-list)
    
*   [Block User](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#block-user)
    
*   [Unblock User](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#unblock-user)
    

The new scopes for these endpoints have also been added to [Authentication](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication/scopes)
. Updated the descriptions of existing scopes for consistency and accuracy.

*   `channel:read:editors`
*   `channel:manage:videos`
*   `user:read:blocked_users`
*   `user:manage:blocked_users`

[v5 migration guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/migration)
 updates:

*   New v5 scope mappings have been added for the above endpoints. See `channel_editor`, `channel_read`, `user_blocks_read`, and `user_blocks_edit`.
*   Five endpoint equivalence definitions have been added for the above endpoints.

`giantbomb_id` set to 0 in the v5 Get Top Games response example to reflect a [game data migration](https://discuss.dev.twitch.tv/t/legacy-endpoints-returning-0-for-giantbomb-id-following-igdb-migration/29125)
.

2021‑01‑08

EventSub updates:

*   Added support for filtering by `type`.
*   Added user login to notification payloads.

Added `twitch://broadcast` mobile deeplink to broadcast a specific category.

Embed updates:

*   `enableCaptions()` function, `disableCaptions()` function, and `Twitch.Player.CAPTIONS` event added.
*   `sandbox` added for embedded chat.
*   `getPlaybackStats()` function and a description of the `PlaybackStats` object added back into the documentation.
*   `autoplay` documentation updated to note the default value is `false`.
*   Removed `frameborder` and `scrolling` from Twitch embed examples as these were deprecated in HTML5.

Feedback and bug reports:

*   [Bring back a function similar to .getPlaybackStats()](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213-developers/suggestions/39162130-bring-back-a-function-similar-to-getplaybackstats)
    
*   [Channel Update Notification Example Contradicts Channel Update Event Documentation](https://github.com/twitchdev/issues/issues/268)
    
*   [Typo in “Chatbots & IRC Guide” section](https://github.com/twitchdev/issues/issues/281)
     and [typo](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213/suggestions/42309586)
    
*   [Google Analytics in extensions: example not up to date with GA changes](https://github.com/twitchdev/issues/issues/277)
    
*   [Typo in EventSub Guide page](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213/suggestions/42381577)
    
*   [Unclear Mention of Regex for Bits Parameter](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213/suggestions/42301396)
    
*   [\[TYPO\] EventSub channel.update docs](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213/suggestions/42230230)
    
*   [Deprecated attribute](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213/suggestions/40632823)
    

2020‑12‑18

Updated auth validation sample with values and the `expires_in` field.

[Updated JavaScript helper examples](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213/suggestions/41541955)
 to use `window.Twitch.ext`.

Clarifcation for linking accounts for time-based Drops.

Miscellaneous API reference fixes.

2020‑12‑17

Details for retriving ingest servers have been moved to the top-level [Video Broadcasting](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/video-broadcast)
 section. This includes the launch of “[Get Ingest Servers](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/video-broadcast/reference#get-ingest-servers)
” to replace its deprecated version previously found in v5.

2020‑12‑04

UserVoice feedback fixes:

*   [Further documenting endpoints that support `first` and `after`](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213-developers/suggestions/39847735-docs-missing-first-pagination-on-api-s-that-suppor)
    
*   [“Get Users” now mentions an app access token can be used](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213-developers/suggestions/40479460-get-users-doesn-t-mention-that-an-app-access-token)
    
*   [`user:read:email` corrected to be optional](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213-developers/suggestions/40803598-helix-users-docs-showing-optional-scope-as-require)
    
*   [`broadcaster_name` documented for “Get Channel Information”](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213-developers/suggestions/41036398-broadcaster-name-not-noted-in-return-values-of-get)
    
*   [Backend typo](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213-developers/suggestions/41954035-typo)
    
*   [Subscriptions webhook link fixed](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213-developers/suggestions/41904073-broken-link)
    
*   [`usage_untimeout` correction](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213-developers/suggestions/41774833-fix-usage-untimeout-documentation-note)
    
*   [OAuth procedure links are clickable](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213/suggestions/40366696)
    
*   [Possible typo for separating scopes](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213-developers/suggestions/42060712-possible-error-typo)
    
*   [Fixed example payload for Get All Chat Emoticons](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213/suggestions/39847549)
    
*   [Added clarification for expected language query parameters and response values](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213/suggestions/39848104)
    
*   [Fixed link to configuration service reference](https://twitch.uservoice.com/forums/310213/suggestions/39848128)
    

Miscellaneous fixes:

*   Removed duplicate search results
*   Displaying more search results
*   Provided the full accept header in the v5 “Requests” section
*   Changed the date format in the changelog to YYYY-MM-DD

2020‑12‑01

Added `progress` field to Hype Train [EventSub subscription types](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub/eventsub-subscription-types)
.

2020‑11‑30

Corrections and edits to the [EventSub](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub)
 documentation. Fixed a typo for “msg-param-gift-months” under [IRC usernotices](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/irc/tags#usernotice-tags)
.

2020‑11‑19

Corrections and edits to the [EventSub](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub)
 documentation.

Updated [Drops Analytics](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/insights#drops-analytics-beta)
 image.

Changed type for `pagination` [response field](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference)
 to be “object containing a string”.

Corrections and edits to [scopes](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication/#scopes)
 documentation.

2020‑11‑13

Added documentation for [EventSub](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/eventsub)
.

Added Channel Points API to the [API Reference](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference)
.

Added a v5 to Twitch API [migration guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/migration)
.

2020‑11‑04

Added information about [Drops Analytics](https://dev.twitch.tv/insights/#drops-analytics-beta)
 to documentation.

2020‑10‑29

Removed CurseForge references from docs.

API Reference:

*   Corrected token requirement for [Get Stream Tags](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#get-stream-tags)
    .
*   Made sub-section ordering consistent, listing query parameters before body parameters.
*   Corrected [Modify Channel Information](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#modify-channel-information)
     documentation which had body parameters listed as query parameters.

Pub Sub:

*   Updated user notices for multi-month subscriptions.
*   Added sample code for multi-month subscriptions.
*   Updated the topic for [chat moderator actions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/pubsub#topics)
    .

2020‑10‑26

[API Reference](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference)
:

*   Fixed issue causing apostrophes to show as random characters.
*   Removed duplicate entry for Get Stream Tags.

[Authentication Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication)
:

*   Added maximum OAuth token limits.
*   Added `channel:read:redemptions` scope.
*   Corrected the spelling of `channel:manage:broadcast`.

Clarified instructions for supplying parameters in the Webhooks Reference.

Clarified limits in the Webhooks Guide.

In the [Extensions Guide](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions)
, corrected the environment variable `HTTPS=true` for create-react-app.

2020‑10‑09

Updates to the [API Reference](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference)
:

*   Made example code consistent.
*   Eliminated duplicate entry for the Get Stream Tags endpoint.
*   Fixed typos.

Fixed a typo in the [channel:manage:broadcast](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/authentication#scopes)
 scope.

Removed the Glossary.

2020‑09‑23

Removed links to internal documents in [Increase Feedback in Extensions](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/increasing-feedback)
.

2020‑09‑17

Added to the v5 API Get Channel Subscribers endpoint the information that if a user in the subscribers list has been banned, the subscription information will be provided, but the user object will have a value of `null`.

2020‑09‑15

Edited all documentation to replace the terms “blacklist” and “whitelist” with “denylist” and “allowlist”.

Edited and redesigned the top-level page:

*   Fixed broken links.
*   Added links to UserVoice and GitHub for feedback and support.
*   Removed outdated screenshots.
*   Removed redundant links.

Added to the [Get Clips](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#create-clip)
 endpoint documentation that clips are returned sorted by view count, in descending order.

2020‑09‑14

Updated the following endpoints to make clear they are about Bits codes:

*   [Get Code Status](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference/#get-code-status)
    
*   [Redeem Code](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/api/reference#redeem-code)
    

Updated Extensions documentation to say that layout needs to accommodate variable height rather than fixed at 700 pixels.

2020‑09‑12

Added discussion of subscription status support to the [Extensions Monetization](https://dev.twitch.tv/docs/extensions/monetization)
 documentation.
